title: World Money Mod
description: Role-play mod that adds a collection of realistic currencies - dollars, euros, rubles and hryvnias - in the form of bills and coins. Ideal for RP servers, trading and atmosphere.
body:
🪙 World Money Mod
A Minecraft mod that adds collectible and usable versions of real-world currencies — perfect for roleplay, trading, or server economies.

Features:

- 💵 U.S. Dollars
![USD item frames](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/dfc522998ae9ffe0c57506f172cb7cfd4d3aaf17.png)
- 💶 Euros
![EUR item frames](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/da9086a1f0934a33d55bd4de3ec55f35ab15842f.png)
- 🇷🇺 Russian Rubles
![RUB item frames](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/250ce7f68c4bc81d41916013b9acf43897d17f61.png)
- 🇺🇦 Ukrainian Hryvnia
![UAH item frames](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/42b3446d30111d3fddb635d94a7d882b3253d02c.png)
- 📁 Custom creative tab

- 🖼️ Textures of real money

Great for:

- 🎭 Roleplay servers

- 🏪 In-game stores and shops

- 💰 Economy-based gameplay
